summary: API smoke tests executed with 3 tests passing OpenAPI schema validation before encountering timeout on GET endpoint sweep test. The /api/v1/brain/most-connected endpoint returned 500 error due to synchronous lock operations exceeding 10s timeout limit.
issues: test_all_get_endpoints timeout: GET endpoint sweep could not complete in 120 seconds
Background worker threads taking extended initialization time
Test timeout (10s per test) too aggressive for complex graph operations

details.root_cause: Synchronous lock wait in knowledge_brain.py:326 during get_node() call

recommendations: Increase test timeout or run critical path subset only
Split smoke tests into fast and slow endpoint categories
